Class LevelManager

java.lang.Object
model.level.LevelManager
public class LevelManager extends Object
Main manager of the levels that saves them, create the map (with the distribution of the items) and handles the transition and commands of the Player.

  • Constructor Details

    • LevelManager

      public LevelManager(Play p)
      Loads the levels and initialize them together with the puzzles distribution and the map
      Parameters:
      p - Used to get the datas from (mostly the player)

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update()
      Update the current level and check for the level transition

    • moveElevator

      public void moveElevator(int move)
      Move the elevator in the Elevator Level
      Parameters:
      move - Integer used to tell where to go, 1 = DOWN, -1 = UP
